name: PagerDuty
description: Monitor PagerDuty incident response configuration including services, escalation policies, and on-call schedules for compliance evidence

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to PagerDuty.
2. Go to Integrations > API Access Keys.
3. Click 'Create New API Key', give it a description (e.g. 'Comp AI'), select Read-Only.
4. Copy the API key and paste it below.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in PagerDuty > Integrations > API Access Keys. Create a General Access Key with Read-Only access.

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies that PagerDuty services have escalation policies configured for incident response

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that PagerDuty escalation policies are configured with escalation rules for alerting
